job_title: Full Stack Developer Next.js | Spring Boot
description: I transform your ideas into powerful and elegant applications.
about_description: I am a Full Stack Developer with a passion for building web applications. I specialize in Next.js, Java, and Spring Boot.
devops_description: Presentation of my Mets & Merveilles project, a web application that allows you to manage menus, dishes, and orders in a restaurant, with a focus on automating processes and managing the logic for creating dishes and menus.
kanban_description: The Kanban Board in Mets & Merveilles helps manage tasks related to menu creation and restaurant operations.
pipeline_description: The pipeline in Mets & Merveilles automates the deployment process, ensuring that the application is always up to date.
cypress_description: Cypress enables automated application testing, ensuring the reliability of features.
cucumber_description: Behavior-driven development (BDD) approach with scenarios written in natural language for greater clarity.
firebase_description: Using Firebase Storage for hosting images, allowing to:
firebase_description_2: Reduce the load on the main database.
firebase_description_3: Manage access permissions to images to ensure data security.
bloc_1_description: Using Git and GitHub for version control and collaboration on source code. Respected conventional commits format for clear and structured commit history.
bloc_2_description: Using Docker to create lightweight and portable containers for the application, facilitating deployment and scalability.
bloc_3_description: Using SonarQube to analyze code quality and detect potential issues, ensuring clean and maintainable code.
